description: CompositionBlue and red check top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, key hole detail at the back, ruffle detail along the front, short puff sleeves and an elasticated hemFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryPerfectly stylish and comfortable, this top from wrangler makes for a great casual wear. The puff sleeves create a feel of casual comfort, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim fit jeans and sandals.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
